key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: FY2025 operating income $3440.0M plus normalized net investment income contribution, ÷ 534.878M shares = $5.85/sh; bridges GAAP OCF and operating income per share
Low-single-digit premium growth in Japan and U.S. worksite channel; investment portfolio supports mid-single-digit owner-cash growth

open_questions: Validate normalized owner cash **$5.85/sh** against company adjusted operating EPS in Q4 2025 supplemental materials (not in ticker PDF folder).
Confirm stance **watch** vs quality-franchise override if human wants hold on dividend + buyback floor.
No third-party sources indexed; re-run scan when Substacks or HK material is added.
thesis: Aflac Incorporated sells supplemental health and life insurance, mainly cancer and medical policies in Japan and accident, disability, and hospital indemnity products through U.S. worksite channels. **[Fact]** Customers are individuals who buy coverage at work or through agencies and banks; the company earns premiums, pays claims, and invests float in a large fixed-income portfolio. **[Fact]** FY2025 total revenues were **$18.93 billion**; net income was **$3.65 billion** (diluted earnings per share **$6.82**). **[Fact]** Aflac Japan generated roughly **$10.66 billion** of earned premium revenue and Aflac U.S. roughly **$6.90 billion** in FY2025 (`AFL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260225_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_011402.htm`). **[Fact]** Investments and cash totaled **$103.8 billion** against policy liabilities of **$69.6 billion** at year-end 2025. **[Inference]** This is a mature, high-persistency supplemental insurer with earnings levered to Japan demographics, U.S. voluntary benefits penetration, and investment spreads.
why_market_wrong: There is **no dated predictive attribute** (Horizon Kinetics lens: **none**). **[Inference]** The market may treat FY2025 GAAP earnings volatility (net income down from **$5.44 billion** in 2024) as a franchise impairment when much of the swing is investment marks and reserve mechanics, not lost supplemental demand. **[Inference]** At roughly **$122** per share, the stock prices a quality compounder fairly; return is normalized owner cash at price, not a timed mispricing catalyst.
